title: Tutorial 06: Custom Contract Calls (React + Supabase)
body:
**May** — This is the "build anything" tutorial. useCallAnyContract lets developers interact with ANY smart contract on Starknet. DeFi protocols, NFT collections, DAOs, games — anything. You're also testing React (Vite) for the first time — that's our third frontend framework — and Supabase auth (fourth auth provider). After this tutorial, we'll have validated 4 frameworks and 4 auth providers. That's when we can launch the CLI. You're literally building the last piece before `create-chipi-app` goes live.

## Framework: React (Vite)
## Auth Provider: Supabase

## Docs pages to follow (in order)

1. https://docs.chipipay.com/sdk/react/gasless-quickstart
2. https://docs.chipipay.com/sdk/react/gasless-supabase-setup
3. https://docs.chipipay.com/sdk/react/hooks/use-create-wallet
4. https://docs.chipipay.com/sdk/react/hooks/use-call-any-contract
5. https://docs.chipipay.com/sdk/react/hooks/use-approve
6. https://docs.chipipay.com/sdk/guides/on-chain-verification
7. https://docs.chipipay.com/sdk/guides/custom-wallet-types
8. https://docs.chipipay.com/sdk/core/tx-builder
9. https://docs.chipipay.com/sdk/core/erc20
10. https://docs.chipipay.com/sdk/core/amount

## Features to test

- [ ] Sign in with Supabase (email or Google)
- [ ] Create wallet
- [ ] Approve a token spend (useApprove)
- [ ] Call a custom smart contract function
- [ ] Use TxBuilder to compose a multi-call transaction
- [ ] Use Erc20 helper to read token info
- [ ] Use Amount for token math (decimals handling)

## Hooks to exercise

- `useCreateWallet`
- `useCallAnyContract`
- `useApprove`
- `TxBuilder` (from @chipi-stack/core)
- `Erc20` (from @chipi-stack/core)
- `Amount` (from @chipi-stack/core)
- `TokenRegistry` (from @chipi-stack/core)

## When something doesn't work

Same process. File in correct repo. Link here.

## Deliverables

- [ ] Working project in `tutorials/06-custom-contracts/`
- [ ] Clean clone works
- [ ] `VALIDATION.md` with pass/fail. The quality of this tutorial is what decides if we launch the CLI — every check must be thorough. Comment **contract-explorer** to unlock your next tutorial
- [ ] Every hook/class above used in code
- [ ] Recording: 5-8 min
- [ ] All bugs filed
- [ ] YouTube video link in PR description

## Use case ideas (mention in your recording)

- DeFi portfolio tracker connected to Ekubo/JediSwap
- NFT minting page for an art collection
- DAO voting interface with on-chain governance

## Your impact

This is the CLI launch gate. After tutorial 06, we have enough validated templates to ship `create-chipi-app`.
